description: A classy belt is an indisputible wardrobe essential for the modern man, and bulchee meets the need by providing quality, timeless, fashion-forward accessories. Made of genuine Italian leather with rivet detail near the buckleTang clasp for a snug Fit with a fixed loopHoles for a customised fitBrand badge at the end of the beltCareWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
